last_report: Slate of 10 games with 4 picks drafted. NBA official injury PDF available for all 19 teams — full confidence rules apply. Key themes: franchise player absences dominate (Giannis, Edwards, Doncic, Williams all confirmed OUT); tanking teams create noise across multiple games. OKC vs LAL flagged as anomaly (LeBron GTD, extreme pricing) — deferred to Commit. Picks focus on: Indiana covering the large spread vs depleted MIN at home; Brooklyn ML as home team with Giannis absent from Milwaukee; Toronto ML with superior L15 over cold Miami (Quickley Questionable reduces confidence but edge holds); Charlotte +4.5 backed by exceptional L15 form (+43.5) and play-in motivation vs Boston. Pace data technically available but O/U lines not offered on tonight's slate — no totals evaluated. Houston vs Phoenix was a near-miss borderline rejection.

settled_bets.match: Atlanta Hawks vs New York Knicks
settled_bets.reasoning: COMMIT REVIEW — CONFIRMED. Scout odds 2.02, commit odds 2.00 (movement -0.02, minimal, within 0.10 threshold). Anchor players Brunson, KAT, Bridges all active (not listed on injury report). ATL injury update: only RayJ Dennis Questionable (G League Two-Way — irrelevant to thesis). Core thesis intact: NYK season NetRtg +6.6 vs ATL +2.6 (4.0-pt gap in NYK's favour). ATL L10 hot streak fade signal valid (8-2 L10 but 45-33 season record vs NYK 50-28). NYK better season record, better NetRtg, healthy franchise players. ATL's surge (L15 +36.6) flagged but regression-fade at 2.00 still strong value. EV recalculated at commit odds: EV = (0.72 × 2.00) - 1 = 0.44. Well above 0.05 threshold. Odds 2.00 within ML range (1.65-2.50). Confidence 72 (High tier) unchanged. Stake maintained at €150 (15% — conservative within High tier due to ATL home court and L15 surge counter-signal).

settled_bets.match: Denver Nuggets vs Portland Trail Blazers
settled_bets.reasoning: COMMIT REVIEW — CONFIRMED at current line. Scout drafted DEN -8.5 at 1.94. Current market: DEN -8.0 at 1.95. Spread compressed 0.5 pts (slight adjustment against DEN spread), but odds improved +0.01 to 1.95. Anchor check: Jokic, Murray, MPJ all active (none listed on injury report). POR injury update confirms thesis: Damian Lillard OUT (injury management confirmed by NBA official), Jerami Grant OUT (right calf), Shaedon Sharpe OUT (reaction), Vit Krejci OUT. POR missing four key contributors including franchise player Lillard. DEN core intact with Jokic (presumed available), home court advantage at Ball Arena, W8 streak, 9-1 L10. Season NetRtg gap: DEN +4.8 vs POR -0.4 = 5.2 pts in DEN's favour. Counter-signal noted: POR L15 +46.2 is anomalously high but roster tonight is severely depleted — L15 figure does not reflect tonight's deployment. At -8.0 (easier cover than -8.5), the pick retains strong value. EV = (0.68 × 1.95) - 1 = 0.326. Spread odds 1.95 within target (1.80-2.30). Confidence 68 (Medium tier) unchanged. Stake €150 maintained.

LATE PICK — ADDED AT COMMIT. Scout noted this game and drafted SAS -8.5 at 1.90 but it was not included in final draft picks for commit review. Re-evaluated at commit time. TIME GATE: Game at 00:00 UTC, commit at 22:27 UTC = 93 min > 20 min ✅. ODDS GATE: SAS -8.5 at 1.89. Within spread target 1.80-2.30 ✅. QUANTITY GATE: First and only new pick at commit phase ✅. LINE MOVEMENT: Scout had 1.90, now 1.89 — movement of -0.01, negligible. INJURY CHECK (NBA Official): SAS injury report shows only Harrison Ingram Out (G League), David Jones Garcia Out (ankle surgery), Emanuel Miller Out (G League) — no franchise-level absences. PHI: Johni Broome Out (recovery), Cameron Payne Out (strain) — no franchise-level absences. SAS anchor players (Wembanyama, Castle, Vassell) not listed = active. THESIS: SAS L15 +48.9 (elite, top of entire league). Season NetRtg +8.2 vs PHI -0.2 = 8.4-pt gap. SAS record 59-19 vs PHI 43-35. SAS L10 9-1 vs PHI 6-4. SAS home at Frost Bank Center. PHI L15 +11.9 is decent but SAS form is genuinely elite — record validates this is not a misleading hot streak on a mediocre team (59-19 is a top-tier record). CONFIDENCE: Base 65 (SAS clearly superior team, home, elite form) + 5 (PHI depleted: Broome, Payne out) = 70. EV = (0.70 × 1.89) - 1 = 1.323 - 1 = 0.323 ≥ 0.05 ✅. STAKE: Confidence 70 = High tier (70-84) = 20-25% of €1,000. Use 20% = €200. Total committed stake after all picks: €150 + €150 + €200 = €500 = 50% of bankroll ≤ 70% ✅.

rejected_games.reason: Utah confirmed tank (21-58, L10: 1-9, L15: -59.0). New Orleans ML at 1.16 — well below 1.60 minimum odds target. Utah ML at 5.50 requires betting on confirmed tank team; skills say require ≥2.20 and strong situational reason but tanking criteria fully met for Jazz. Utah +11.5 spread: tanking teams historically don't cover, no edge here. Pelicans also tank-tier (25-54). Dejounte Murray Questionable adds uncertainty for NOP side. No qualifying market.

rejected_games.reason: GS Warriors ML at 1.11 — far below 1.60 minimum. Sacramento Kings ML at 6.75 — requires betting confirmed worst-record team in West. No qualifying edge.

rejected_games.match: Los Angeles Lakers vs Oklahoma City Thunder
rejected_games.reason: LINE ANOMALY: OKC ML at 1.06 — extreme price. LAL ML at 9.50 — extreme underdog price. Both teams have critical absences: OKC: Jalen Williams OUT (confirmed NBA official), Thomas Sorber OUT. LAL: Luka Doncic OUT (confirmed), LeBron James QUESTIONABLE. LAL spread +16.5 at 1.92 — even with Doncic out, 16.5 points is a massive line. OKC L15: +48.0, LAL L15: +3.8. The extreme pricing and LeBron GTD make this highly uncertain. Anomaly flag: OKC at 1.06 with Jalen Williams absent and LeBron status unresolved. Deferred to Commit for LeBron James resolution.

Clippers ML at 1.18 — below 1.60 minimum. Dallas ML at 5.00 — confirmed tank team (25-53, L10: 2-8). Clippers stats unavailable per advanced stats feed. Clippers -11.5 spread: Kyrie Irving OUT, Gafford Doubtful for Dallas but Clippers stats unavailable makes spread analysis unreliable per data quality rules. No qualifying edge.

Houston Rockets ML at 1.97 — within target range. Rockets L15: +39.9 vs Suns L15: +16.6 — gap of +23.3 in Houston's favour, well above 4.0 threshold. Houston streak: W6. However: Fred VanVleet OUT, Steven Adams OUT confirmed. Suns ML at 1.85 — Phoenix home, L10: 4-6. Rockets confidence base: 65 (strong L15 edge, hot streak). Suns are cold (L10: 4-6, prior skid). Houston road with key absences (VanVleet, Adams) but these are role-supporting players, not franchise. No B2B. EV for Houston ML at 1.97: (0.65 × 1.97) - 1 = 1.2805 - 1 = 0.2805. Strong EV. BUT: Phoenix home court (+0.10-0.15 odds factor), and Phoenix +1.6 NetRtg is positive. Houston -5.0 NetRtg advantage season-long. Close evaluation — this game nearly qualified. Ultimately the VanVleet absence (key playmaker) and Phoenix home court keep confidence near the border. Marginal rejection — would have drafted but the 4 picks already drafted per selectivity target of 2-4. Noting Houston as near-miss with EV 0.28 if confidence at 65 holds.

late_scout_rejections.reason: Both teams heavily depleted. DET now missing Cunningham (franchise player OUT — Pneumothorax), Tobias Harris OUT (hip management), Caris LeVert OUT (management). ORL missing Franz Wagner OUT (injury management), Jett Howard OUT, Jonathan Isaac OUT. ORL L15 -25.7 disqualifies ML pick; DET ML at 1.80 too low (not enough confidence to back without Cunningham/Harris/LeVert). EV insufficient for any viable pick — confidence for ORL ML max ~48% yields EV = (0.48 × 2.04) - 1 = -0.02, below threshold.

CLE now missing Donovan Mitchell OUT (right ankle sprain — franchise player), James Harden OUT (personal reasons), Max Strus OUT, Dean Wade OUT, Thomas Bryant OUT. CLE L15 already -0.5 with full roster, now severely depleted. MEM L15 -48.5 (historically worst on slate), 25-53 record, L10 1-9. MEM +13.0 spread: even with CLE depleted (but Garland + Mobley still active), MEM's catastrophic recent form makes covering 13 points unreliable. Confidence max ~50% for MEM spread = EV = (0.50 × 1.91) - 1 = -0.045, negative EV. CLE ML at 1.12 outside valid range. No viable pick.

Game not on Scout's primary slate. No advanced stats (OffRtg/DefRtg/NetRtg/Pace) provided for MIA or TOR in tonight's data feed. Insufficient data to assess edge with required confidence. TOR ML 1.98 / MIA ML 1.84 are within range but cannot calculate reliable EV without NetRtg data. Rejected — insufficient data.

BOS ML 1.43 below ML floor (1.65). CHA ML 2.90 above ML ceiling (2.50). BOS spread -6.0 at 1.89 within range, but no advanced stats provided for BOS or CHA. Also late pick quota already used on SAS -8.5. Rejected — odds out of range for ML, insufficient data for spread, quota exhausted.
